# Chapter 13: Network systems  (~120 pp)
- 13.1 Power grids: structure and dynamics (20) · 13.2 Transport networks (15) · 13.3 Communication networks revisited from VII (15) · 13.4 Water and gas networks (15) · 13.5 Network resilience and graph properties (15) · 13.6 Cascading failure in network systems (18) · 13.7 Failure section: 2003 North America blackout, 2012 India blackout, BGP cascades (22)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, failure. **Project**: model a small grid; simulate a cascading failure. **Exercises**: 30.
